001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.bean.hal;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Utils.*;
022
023import java.util.*;
024
025import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
028
029/**
030 * Represents a HAL Resource Object as defined by
031 * <a href="https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/draft-kelly-json-hal-08#section-4">draft-kelly-json-hal-08 &#167; 4</a>.
032 *
033 * <p>
034 * A HAL Resource carries three pieces of state:
035 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
036 *   <li>The reserved {@code _links} member - a map of relation name to either a single {@link HalLink}
037 *     or a {@link HalLinkArray}.
038 *   <li>The reserved {@code _embedded} member - a map of relation name to either a single {@link HalResource}
039 *     or a {@link HalResourceArray} (sub-resources). HAL embeddings are conceptually a <i>tree</i>; cyclic
040 *     {@code _embedded} graphs are rejected by Juneau's {@code BeanTraverseContext} by default.
041 *   <li>Arbitrary payload fields, set via the dynamic {@link #set(String,Object)} method (uses the
042 *     {@code @BeanProp("*")} extra-properties triplet, the same pattern used by {@code OpenApiElement} and
043 *     {@code SwaggerElement}).
044 * </ul>
045 *
046 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
047 * <p class='bjava'>
048 *    HalResource <jv>order</jv> = <jk>new</jk> HalResource()
049 *       .addLink(<js>"self"</js>, <jk>new</jk> HalLink().setHref(<js>"/orders/123"</js>))
050 *       .addLinks(<js>"curies"</js>,
051 *          <jk>new</jk> HalLink().setName(<js>"acme"</js>).setHref(<js>"https://acme.example/{rel}"</js>).setTemplated(<jk>true</jk>))
052 *       .set(<js>"total"</js>, 99.50);
053 *
054 *    String <jv>json</jv> = JsonSerializer.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.serialize(<jv>order</jv>);
055 * </p>
056 *
057 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
058 *   <li class='link'><a href="https://stateless.group/hal_specification.html">HAL Specification</a>
059 *   <li class='link'><a href="https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/draft-kelly-json-hal-08">draft-kelly-json-hal-08</a>
060 *   <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauBeanHal">juneau-bean-hal</a>
061 * </ul>
062 */
063@Marshalled
064@SuppressWarnings({
065   "java:S116", // Field names mirror HAL spec.
066   "java:S115" // Constant names intentionally mirror argument identifiers.
067})
068public class HalResource {
069
070   private static final String ARG_property = "property";
071   private static final String ARG_relation = "relation";
072
073   private Map<String,Object> _links;
074   private Map<String,Object> _embedded;
075   private Map<String,Object> properties;
076
077   /**
078    * Default constructor.
079    */
080   public HalResource() {
081      /* intentionally empty — required public no-arg constructor for bean creation/decoding */
082   }
083
084   /**
085    * Bean property getter:  <property>_links</property>.
086    *
087    * <p>
088    * The reserved {@code _links} member. Each map value is either a single {@link HalLink} (rendered as a JSON
089    * object on the wire) or a {@link HalLinkArray} (rendered as a JSON array).
090    *
091    * @return The value of the <property>_links</property> property, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
092    */
093   @BeanProp("_links")
094   @Swap(HalLinkOrArraySwap.class)
095   public Map<String,Object> getLinks() {
096      return _links;
097   }
098
099   /**
100    * Bean property setter:  <property>_links</property>.
101    *
102    * @param value The new value for this property. Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset.
103    * @return This object.
104    */
105   @BeanProp("_links")
106   @Swap(HalLinkOrArraySwap.class)
107   public HalResource setLinks(Map<String,Object> value) {
108      _links = value;
109      return this;
110   }
111
112   /**
113    * Convenience method that adds a single link under the given relation.
114    *
115    * <p>
116    * If a value already exists for {@code relation}, it is replaced with the supplied single link. To accumulate
117    * multiple links under the same relation use {@link #addLinks(String, HalLink...)} instead.
118    *
119    * @param relation The link relation (e.g. {@code "self"}, {@code "next"}, {@code "curies"}).
120    * @param value The link to set.
121    * @return This object.
122    */
123   public HalResource addLink(String relation, HalLink value) {
124      assertArgNotNull(ARG_relation, relation);
125      if (_links == null)
126         _links = map();
127      _links.put(relation, value);
128      return this;
129   }
130
131   /**
132    * Convenience method that appends one or more links to a {@link HalLinkArray} stored under {@code relation}.
133    *
134    * <p>
135    * If the current value at {@code relation} is a single {@link HalLink}, it is promoted to a {@link HalLinkArray}
136    * containing the original link and the appended ones.
137    *
138    * @param relation The link relation.
139    * @param values The links to append.
140    * @return This object.
141    */
142   public HalResource addLinks(String relation, HalLink...values) {
143      assertArgNotNull(ARG_relation, relation);
144      if (_links == null)
145         _links = map();
146      var existing = _links.get(relation);
147      HalLinkArray arr;
148      if (existing instanceof HalLinkArray a) {
149         arr = a;
150      } else if (existing instanceof HalLink l) {
151         arr = new HalLinkArray(l);
152         _links.put(relation, arr);
153      } else {
154         arr = new HalLinkArray();
155         _links.put(relation, arr);
156      }
157      arr.addAll(values);
158      return this;
159   }
160
161   /**
162    * Bean property getter:  <property>_embedded</property>.
163    *
164    * <p>
165    * The reserved {@code _embedded} member. Each map value is either a single {@link HalResource} or a
166    * {@link HalResourceArray}.
167    *
168    * @return The value of the <property>_embedded</property> property, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
169    */
170   @BeanProp("_embedded")
171   @Swap(HalResourceOrArraySwap.class)
172   public Map<String,Object> getEmbedded() {
173      return _embedded;
174   }
175
176   /**
177    * Bean property setter:  <property>_embedded</property>.
178    *
179    * <p>
180    * Note: HAL embeddings are conceptually a tree, not a graph. Juneau's {@code BeanTraverseContext} throws on
181    * cyclic references by default, which matches the spec.
182    *
183    * @param value The new value for this property. Can be <jk>null</jk> to unset.
184    * @return This object.
185    */
186   @BeanProp("_embedded")
187   @Swap(HalResourceOrArraySwap.class)
188   public HalResource setEmbedded(Map<String,Object> value) {
189      _embedded = value;
190      return this;
191   }
192
193   /**
194    * Convenience method that embeds a single sub-resource under the given relation.
195    *
196    * @param relation The relation name.
197    * @param value The sub-resource.
198    * @return This object.
199    */
200   public HalResource addEmbedded(String relation, HalResource value) {
201      assertArgNotNull(ARG_relation, relation);
202      if (_embedded == null)
203         _embedded = map();
204      _embedded.put(relation, value);
205      return this;
206   }
207
208   /**
209    * Convenience method that appends one or more sub-resources to a {@link HalResourceArray} stored under
210    * {@code relation}.
211    *
212    * @param relation The relation name.
213    * @param values The sub-resources to append.
214    * @return This object.
215    */
216   public HalResource addEmbedded(String relation, HalResource...values) {
217      assertArgNotNull(ARG_relation, relation);
218      if (_embedded == null)
219         _embedded = map();
220      var existing = _embedded.get(relation);
221      HalResourceArray arr;
222      if (existing instanceof HalResourceArray a) {
223         arr = a;
224      } else if (existing instanceof HalResource r) {
225         arr = new HalResourceArray(r);
226         _embedded.put(relation, arr);
227      } else {
228         arr = new HalResourceArray();
229         _embedded.put(relation, arr);
230      }
231      arr.addAll(values);
232      return this;
233   }
234
235   /**
236    * Generic property keyset.
237    *
238    * @return All the payload (non-{@code _links}, non-{@code _embedded}) property names on this resource. Never <jk>null</jk>.
239    */
240   @BeanProp("*")
241   public Set<String> extraKeys() {
242      return properties == null ? Collections.emptySet() : properties.keySet();
243   }
244
245   /**
246    * Generic property getter.
247    *
248    * @param property The property name. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
249    * @return The property value, or <jk>null</jk> if the property is not set.
250    */
251   @BeanProp("*")
252   public Object get(String property) {
253      assertArgNotNull(ARG_property, property);
254      return opt(properties).map(x -> x.get(property)).orElse(null);
255   }
256
257   /**
258    * Generic property setter.
259    *
260    * <p>
261    * Use this to set arbitrary payload fields alongside {@code _links} and {@code _embedded}.
262    *
263    * @param property The property name. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
264    * @param value The new value for the property.
265    * @return This object.
266    */
267   @BeanProp("*")
268   public HalResource set(String property, Object value) {
269      assertArgNotNull(ARG_property, property);
270      if (properties == null)
271         properties = map();
272      properties.put(property, value);
273      return this;
274   }
275
276   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
277   public String toString() {
278      return JsonSerializer.DEFAULT.toString(this);
279   }
280}
